title: Manufacturing Engineer - Procter & Gamble India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Procter & Gamble India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Procter & Gamble India has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Procter & Gamble India:
Procter & Gamble India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Procter & Gamble India!
